name: ZIMRA taxpayer registration
notes: The Black Book record's applicability covers organisations starting a business; non-profit tax treatment and exemptions are deliberately not asserted. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Organisations register with ZIMRA through TaRMS when starting operations; tax treatment of non-profit income requires ZIMRA confirmation.
appliesWhen: On starting operations; specific exemptions must be confirmed with ZIMRA.

name: Employer (PAYE) registration and remittance (ZIMRA)
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to businesses that become employers; applies equally to non-profit employers. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: NGOs that employ staff register for PAYE, remit monthly and file the annual ITF 16 return.
appliesWhen: On becoming an employer; monthly remittance and annual return thereafter.

name: NSSA employer registration and POBS contributions
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to employers of labour. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: NGOs employing labour register with NSSA and remit Pensions and Other Benefits Scheme contributions monthly.
appliesWhen: On becoming an employer of labour; monthly remittance thereafter.

name: Social welfare portfolio oversight (context)
notes: Recorded as portfolio context from the Parliament ministers list. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: The Ministry of Public Service, Labour and Social Welfare holds the social-welfare portfolio under which private voluntary organisations are administered.
appliesWhen: Portfolio context; PVO registration obligations are recorded as gaps below.

name: Private voluntary organisation (PVO) registration
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: PVO registration, trust registration alternatives and district-level MOUs for NGO operations are not yet evidenced by Black Book records; no process or fee is asserted and entity-form choice needs professional advice.

name: Non-profit tax status and exemptions
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Income-tax, VAT and duty treatment of non-profit organisations (including any exemption processes) is not yet evidenced by Black Book records; nothing is asserted.

name: NGO coordination bodies
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: NGO coordination and membership bodies are not yet represented in the Black Book's business associations.
